title: ferulago subvelutina
intro: Ferulago subvelutina, also known as sub-velvet fern-leaved fennel or mountain fennel, is a plant species belonging to the parsley family (Apiaceae). It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and expectorant effects. The health benefits of Ferulago subvelutina include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as digestive problems like bloating and cramps. Ferulago subvelutina is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or as a dried herb, and can also be used in tinctures or essential oils to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
